contract_summary: This is a replacement wrapper that manages the refcount of the `last_bonding_candidate` pointer in `orig_node`. It atomically increments the reference count of the new candidate (if non-NULL) via `kref_get`, releases the reference of the old candidate via `batadv_orig_ifinfo_put`, and updates the pointer under the protection of `neigh_list_lock`. The caller must supply a valid new candidate (or NULL) and must manage its own reference to that object. After this call, the `orig_node` holds a reference to the new candidate (if any) that will be released when a subsequent replacement or cleanup occurs. The function is safe to call with NULL for either candidate, and the lock ensures consistency between pointer assignment and refcount operations.
